## 📋 Type
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] 📖 User Guide - End-user documentation
- [ ] 🔧 Technical Documentation - Architecture, API, development
- [ ] 🚀 Getting Started - Setup, installation, quickstart
- [ ] 📝 README - Project overview and main README
- [ ] 🎓 Tutorial - Step-by-step learning content
- [ ] 🔌 API Reference - API endpoints and specifications
- [ ] ❓ FAQ - Frequently asked questions
- [ ] 📊 Architecture - System design and diagrams
- [ ] 🔄 Changelog - Release notes and updates

## ⏱️ Effort Estimation
- [ ] Quick - < 1 hour
- [ ] Short - 2-4 hours
- [ ] Medium - 1 day
- [ ] Long - 2-3 days

## 🎯 Priority
- [ ] Critical - Blocking users/developers
- [ ] High - Important for adoption/contribution
- [ ] Medium - Helpful improvement
- [ ] Low - Nice to have
